title: [ImportVerilog][Moore] Use more specific casting operations for string, real, and time casts
body:
There are unpacked -> packed conversions necessary within streaming operators, and also for ref types.

errors.txt diff:
```
3d2
<   45 error: failed to legalize operation 'moore.conversion'
12a12
>   35 error: failed to legalize operation 'moore.int_to_string'
21a22
>   20 error: failed to legalize operation 'moore.logic_to_time'
37d37
<   11 error: failed to legalize operation 'moore.logic_to_time'
45d44
<    8 error: conversion result type is not currently supported
132d130
<    2 error: failed to legalize operation 'moore.int_to_string'
134a133
>    2 error: failed to legalize operation 'moore.conversion'
253a253
>    1 error: failed to legalize operation 'moore.convert_real'
```
